ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Name of the home team */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Name of the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "home_team_W_PTS" INTEGER /* Points scored by the home team if they won */,
  "away_team_W_PTS" INTEGER /* Points scored by the away team if they won */,
  "home_team_L_PTS" INTEGER /* Points scored by the home team if they lost */,
  "away_team_L_PTS" INTEGER /* Points scored by the away team if they lost */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season in which the game was played (e.g., 2019-2020) */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., Regular Season, Playoff) */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the arena where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance for the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience in the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the coach belongs to */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience as a coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_coaches" (
  "game_coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game-coach entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the coach (e.g., Head Coach, Assistant Coach) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_coaches_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_coaches_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Coach, Analyst, Player) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_game_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., Read, Write, Delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_game_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_game_access_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_league" (
  "team_league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team-league entry */,
  "team" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_league_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)
